examples: Lanolin aka Grease from Animal fur.
Lanolin: Tasting term used to describe a wet - wool aroma or taste.
Exterior activator is ramification of emulsifying agent, dust - proofing agent, hydrous lanolin .
The diatom skeletons of which the mineral is composed are able to soak up huge quantities of oily materials such as lanolin and nitroglycerine, in the same way that a sponge soaks up water.
